files.description: Root layout with Space Grotesk, Inter, JetBrains Mono font loading via next/font/google
Global styles with dark theme tokens, custom scrollbar, glass morphism variables
Glass morphism stat card with icon badge, monospaced value, colored subtext
Search input + 3 filter dropdowns + Export CSV button in glass card
WIN/LOSS/DRAW color-coded badges with glow borders
Expandable judge scores sub-row with dual score bars per judge
Full results table with hover states, category tags, accordion expand for judge breakdown
Smart pagination with page range builder, active page highlight, results count
Main page composing all components with filter state, ambient glow blobs, responsive grid

features: 4 glass stats cards (Total Battles 243, Win Rate 58.4%, Streak 7W, Avg Score 7.82)
Filter bar with search, result type, category, and timeframe dropdowns
Row 3 (DRAW) expanded with judge breakdown showing 3 judges with score bars
Category color tags (Coding=blue, Analysis=purple, Creative=pink, Reasoning=orange)
Empty state with icon when filters return no results
44px touch targets on all interactive elements
